info.brief_description: An alien has crashed to Earth and many crazy happenings occur
info.description:
I just noticed that the “A Visit From A Little Green Man” story doesn’t exist anymore. I was quite fond of that story making some chapters in it so I decided to make a similar version with a few twists in this version. An alien has crash landed on Earth and you can choose whether to follow the pov of the alien or follow a human who hears and goes to the alien ship crash site.

Alien could be anything thought of

Human POV:
(You)Johnny Watson (16): Young boy with average popularity at nearby school and well known in the neighborhood who happens to hear and find the crashed alien ship.

Jenny Watson (30): Johnny’s mother. Very loving and caring for her children. Blond hair, G-cup breasts, huge butt, and wide hips

Sarah Watson (20): Johnny’s older sister. Back from College on break to spend time with her family. Brunette, DD-cup breasts, huge ass.

Julie Watson (10): Johnny’s little sister. Besides their mother she has been very clingy with Johnny. Blond like her mother.

Daniel Watson (33): Johnny’s father. Very busy business man. Takes many trips leading to being rarely seen around the house



This story will and can have:
Sex(Regular, Incest, and Underage allowed)
Pregnancy
Body Invasion (mostly through mouth, cock, vagina, and ass)
Posession
Unbirth
Body Modifications (Bigger breasts, ass/ cock, balls)
Birth
Absorption

Not allowed:
Gay stuff (Or not too much as I’m not too good with that)
Death
Scat
Watersports


Hope any of you join in and have fun making chapters for this story.
